title: American utility firm Itron discloses breach of internal IT network
summary: Itron, Inc. has disclosed, via an 8-K filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), a cybersecurity incident in which an unauthorized third party accessed certain internal systems. [...]
card_summary: Itron, Inc. has disclosed, via an 8-K filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), a cybersecurity incident in which an unauthorized third party accessed certain internal systems. [...]

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.
